datasets.name: EDTeKLA Textbook Corpus
datasets.notes: Canonical textbook corpus. NOT hosted in git (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0, University of Alberta) — rebuilt from the EdTeKLA repo by corpora_builder.adapters.edtekla_adapter; see corpora card cli/shared/corpora-cards/eval-eng-crk-edtekla-textbook.json. local_path file (full_minus_holdout.json) contains 480 entries; the canonical 486-entry figure (436 dev + 50 held-out) refers to the full seed-42 split of the parsed corpus.

datasets.name: EDTeKLA Development Corpus v1
datasets.notes: Full EDTeKLA textbook dev corpus: 436 entries across difficulty tiers 1-5 (from 486 total: 436 dev + 50 held-out test). NOT hosted in git — rebuilt deterministically on demand from the EdTeKLA repo by corpora_builder.adapters.edtekla_adapter into arena/datasets/.cache/ (corpora card cli/shared/corpora-cards/eval-eng-crk-edtekla-dev-v1.json). sha256 re-pinned 2026-06-12 to the canonical curated rebuild serialization (eng-crk-dev-v1.json shape) after the local artifact purge; the old textbook_dev_436.json serialization (3f335236…) is retired.

datasets.name: CRK Master Corpus (local-only)
datasets.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (EdTeKLA-derived segments) / project-curated gold standard
datasets.notes: Custody: crk-translate/eval/datasets/master_corpus.json exists only in local working trees — it was untracked from git on 2026-06-11 because it re-exposes sealed gold_standard and phase1 segments in a single unsealed file (see arena/datasets/DATA_INTEGRITY.md). It is regenerable via build_master_corpus.py and must not be redistributed or used for held-out evaluation.

datasets.name: QUARANTINED: phase1_test_90.json
datasets.notes: 2026-06-11 audit: all 74 current entries (originally 90) appear verbatim in the 436-entry textbook dev corpus. Treat all phase1 results as dev-set results. Untracked from git; local copy lives at crk-translate/eval/datasets/curated/quarantine/phase1_test_90.json. MUST NOT be used for held-out evaluation. See arena/datasets/DATA_INTEGRITY.md and the quarantine/README.md beside the file.

datasets.name: QUARANTINED: edtekla_dev_124.json
datasets.notes: 2026-06-11 audit: all 62 sealed gold_standard entries appear verbatim in this 124-entry file (deliberate per its own metadata, but score-invalidating). Untracked from git; local copy lives at crk-translate/eval/datasets/curated/quarantine/edtekla_dev_124.json. MUST NOT be used for held-out evaluation. See arena/datasets/DATA_INTEGRITY.md and the quarantine/README.md beside the file.
